div.p: PSL (Probe Sequence Length) stays bounded as entries redistribute
Key Insight: Robin Hood equalizes probe distances. Without Robin Hood, naive linear probing could have one entry with high PSL while others have 0. With Robin Hood, PSL variance is minimized.
hash(10) % 8 = 2 Slot 2 empty -> place here Max PSL: 0
hash(18) % 8 = 2 Slot 2 occupied, probe to 3 Max PSL: 1
hash(26) % 8 = 2 Slots 2,3 occupied Probe to slot 4 Max PSL: 2
hash(34) % 8 = 2 Sequential linear probing Eventually slot 5 Max PSL: 3
Robin Hood Displacement! K=2 @ slot 2 (PSL=0) displaces K=10 because it's closer than previous tenants. Max PSL: 4
